nasb.text: All of them are hot like an oven, And they consume their rulers; All their kings have fallen. None of them calls on Me.

esv.text: All of them are hot as an oven, and they devour their rulers. All their kings have fallen, and none of them calls upon me.

cnv.text: 所有的人都熱如火爐， 吞滅他們的官長。 他們所有的君王都倒斃了， 他們中間沒有一人向我呼求。

ccb.text: 他们像炙热的烤炉， 吞灭他们的首领。 他们的君王都倒地而亡， 没有一个向我求救。
